allow: PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); $token = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body '{"email":"admin@youandme.kr","password":"admin1234"}' -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing | ConvertFrom-Json\).token; $body = '{"title":"테스트 이벤트","region":"서울","cafeName":"스타벅스 강남점","date":"2026-06-01","time":"18:00"}'; $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4000/api/admin/events" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"} -UseBasicParsing; $resp.Content)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body '{"email":"admin@youandme.kr","password":"admin1234"}' -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing | Out-Null; "✅ 백엔드 정상" } catch { "백엔드: $_" }; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173" -UseBasicParsing | Out-Null; "✅ 프론트 정상" } catch { "프론트: $_" })
